title: Device Settings - All toggles OFF - Persist after closing tab, settings page or app
scenario: Toggle buttons in Device Settings tabs do not persist as OFF after closing and reopening the tab, returning to Device Home Screen, or restarting the app
steps: Tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings
Go to each tab in Device Settings (e.g., Audio Settings, ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer, Notifications)
Set all toggle buttons in each tab to OFF
Close the Device Settings tab (go back to Device Home Screen)
Reopen Device Settings by tapping on [Device Name]
Observe the state of all toggle buttons
Close and reopen the Poly Studio Mobile app
Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings
Observe the state of all toggle buttons
expected: All toggle buttons remain OFF after closing and reopening the tab, after returning to the Device Home Screen and reopening settings, and after restarting the app.
